# Verify the CLI askpass prompt identifies sesam and the encrypted identity.

exec git init
exec git config user.email test@sesam.dev
exec git config user.name 'Sesam Test'

exec sesam init --user admin

env SESAM_ID=$ADMIN_ENCRYPTED_KEY
env SESAM_ASKPASS=$ASKPASS_RECORD_HELPER
env SESAM_ASKPASS_REQUIRED=force
env ASKPASS_PROMPT=$WORK/askpass.prompt
exec sesam id
stdout 'admin'

exec cat askpass.prompt
stdout 'sesam'
stdout 'ADMIN\.encrypted\.age'
stdout 'sesam\.identity\.[0-9a-f]{32}'
